CreationSetupIntro: Configure the workspace for this new project, then click Initialize to create it and install the agent templates.
OnboardingSubtitle: Orchestrate agentic projects with AI-powered kanban. Connect your preferred AI coding assistant and automate your development workflow.
OnboardingWarning: OpenCode is required for AI agent dispatch. Git is needed for version control. Install missing tools and ensure they're on your PATH, then click Recheck.
